title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: edk2 bug fix update
overview: An update for edk2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: EDK (Embedded Development Kit) is a project to enable UEFI support for Virtual Machines. This package contains a sample 64-bit UEFI firmware for QEMU and KVM. Bug Fix(es): The newer revocation file and Server 2025 required to update it [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-83018)

full_text:
An update for edk2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

EDK (Embedded Development Kit) is a project to enable UEFI support for Virtual Machines. This package contains a sample 64-bit UEFI firmware for QEMU and KVM. Bug Fix(es): The newer revocation file and Server 2025 required to update it [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-83018)
